2603.19807.title: Enhancing Alignment for Unified Multimodal Models via Semantically-Grounded Supervision
2603.19807.paper_summary: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm that integrates multimodal understanding and generation within a unified modeling framework. However, current generative training paradigms suffer from inherent limitations. We present Semantically-Grounded Supervision (SeGroS), a fine-tuning framework designed to resolve the granularity mismatch and supervisory redundancy in UMMs. At its core, we propose a novel visual grounding map to construct two complementary supervision signals. First, we formulate semantic Visual Hints to compensate for the sparsity of text prompts. Second, we generate a semantically-grounded Corrupted Input to explicitly enhance the supervision of masking-based UMMs by restricting the reconstruction loss to core text-aligned regions. Extensive evaluations on GenEval, DPGBench, and CompBench demonstrate that SeGroS significantly improves generation fidelity and cross-modal alignment across various UMM architectures.
2603.19807.paper_summary_zh: 統一多模態模型（UMMs）已成為一種有前景的範式，將多模態理解和生成整合在一個統一的建模框架內。<lb/>然而，當前的生成訓練範式存在固有的限制。<lb/>我們提出了語義基礎監督（SeGroS），這是一個旨在解決UMMs中的粒度不匹配和監督冗餘的微調框架。<lb/>在其核心，我們提出了一種新穎的視覺基礎圖，以構建兩個互補的監督信號。<lb/>首先，我們制定了語義視覺提示，以補償文本提示的稀疏性。<lb/>其次，我們生成了一個語義基礎的損壞輸入，通過將重建損失限制在核心文本對齊區域，明確增強基於遮罩的UMMs的監督。<lb/>在GenEval、DPGBench和CompBench上的廣泛評估顯示，SeGroS顯著提高了各種UMM架構的生成保真度和跨模態對齊。
2603.19807.author: Jiyeong Kim et.al.
2603.19807.authors: Jiyeong Kim, Yerim So, Hyesong Choi, Uiwon Hwang, Dongbo Min
